reading.title: Reading: Recipe instructions
reading.passage: Add two eggs to the bowl. Mix them well. Turn on the oven. Check the cake after twenty minutes. Press the button to stop the timer.

questions.question: When should you check the cake?

reading.title: Reading: A quiet café
reading.passage: This café is quiet and comfortable. The room is clean, but it is a little cold. Some customers say it is too dry inside in winter.
